description_long: This lantern features a tall, rectangular black metal frame with a slightly tapered top and a sturdy base. Each side is fitted with clear glass panels, allowing full visibility of the interior, which contains three white pillar candles of varying heights. The top of the lantern is capped with a flat, square lid and a prominent, angular handle for easy carrying or hanging. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on clean lines and geometric simplicity. The glass panels are set flush within the metal frame, providing a modern and sleek appearance. The lantern is suitable for both outdoor and indoor urban settings, such as patios, sidewalks, or entryways.
description: A tall, black metal lantern with clear glass panels and three white pillar candles inside. It has a square base, a flat top, and a large angular handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three white pillar candles inside the black-framed lantern, with the tallest candle at the back right.
description_view_1: Side view with two candles visible, the tallest at the back and a shorter one in front, handle centered above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two pillar candles, both positioned near the back of the lantern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the tallest candle at the back left and a shorter candle in front, handle visible above.
